name: @fitness-earley/migration
description: Migration scripts for Fitness Earley v2

scripts.prisma:generate: cd ../packages/backend && npm run prisma:generate || prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.migrate: npm run prisma:generate && npx ts-node scripts/migrate-workouts.ts
scripts.migrate:dry-run: npm run prisma:generate && npx ts-node scripts/migrate-workouts.ts --dry-run
